event.description:
To attend: Please enroll here [https://lu.ma/muqvquop](https://lu.ma/muqvquop)

5:30pm - Networking
6:00pm - TechXChange Dev Day Meetup - Open Source AI in NYC for Developers​
Agenda will/may include as many as possible of these talks and demos
​[Granite](https://www.ibm.com/granite/docs/use-cases/all-cookbooks/) \- Open Source Models \- BJ Hargrave & Ming Zhang
[​Docling](https://github.com/docling-project/docling) \- Document processing\, parsing diverse formats \- Michele Dolfi
​[LM Studio](https://lmstudio.ai/) \- Your local AI toolkit & bringing it all together \- Yagil Burowski
​[Bee AI ](https://github.com/i-am-bee)\- Discover\, run\, and compose AI agents from any framework \- Shereen Bellamy
[ ​LocalStack](https://www.localstack.cloud/) \- Develop and test your AI\-powered cloud apps locally \- Waldemar Hummer
​Panel for Q&A
​7:30pm - Networking

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: Open Source AI in NYC

meetup_name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC
